input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.4.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.4.4
            TITLE: adhesive must not be the sole method of attaching the front hoop to the monocoque

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.4.4: Adhesive must not be the sole method of attaching the Front Hoop to the monocoque
F.7.4.4 Adhesive must not be the sole method of attaching the Front Hoop to the monocoque

final_answer: Adhesive must not be the sole method of attaching the Front Hoop to the monocoque
